v.1
Irresistible Bribe Ideas
Here is a quick list of ideas to consider for your Irresistible Bribe:
1. Webinar / teleseminar (Automated, pre-recorded version)
2. Special PDF report, ebook, white paper, cheat sheet or
blueprint
3. Email tips series
4. Expert audio interview series
5. Video series
6. Short e-course or tutorial
7. Newsletter / ezine subscription
8. Memberships (Free or free trial)
9. Free trials (software download, web applications)
10. Free consultation
11. Free online presentation
12. Contest or sweepstakes
